user.title: Rosdomofon
user.description:
Enter the Russian phone number registered in Rosdomofon.

Format: {note}

sms.title: Phone confirmation
sms.description: Enter the SMS code sent to {phone}.

error.sms_failed: Failed to send SMS. Please check the phone number and try again.
error.invalid_code: Invalid SMS code. Please try again.

settings.title: Recognition service (DeepFace)
settings.description: Set the DeepFace service address and recognition parameters.

data.detector: Face detector (opencv — fast; retinaface — more accurate but heavier)
data.prefilter: Motion pre-filter (skip DeepFace on static frames)
data.debug: Debug: gallery of frames sent to DeepFace

people.title: People — face gallery

cameras.title: Cameras and locks
cameras.description: For each camera choose the lock to open on recognition. Leave empty to disable auto-unlock for that camera.

error.deepface_unreachable: DeepFace service is not reachable at the given address.

abort.no_gallery_url: Could not build the gallery link: no internal/external URL is configured in Home Assistant.

generate_share_link.name: Generate guest link
generate_share_link.description: Generates a temporary link for a guest to open a lock.

entity_id.name: Lock
entity_id.description: Entity ID of the Rosdomofon lock.

ttl_hours.name: Validity period (hours)
ttl_hours.description: How many hours the link will be active (default 12).
